results.criterion: `triage-report.md` is created and contains a `# Incident Triage Report` heading
results.command: python triage.py && grep -q '# Incident Triage Report' triage-report.md

results.criterion: `triage-report.md` contains a `## Summary` section with total, open, and resolved counts
results.command: python triage.py && grep -q '## Summary' triage-report.md && grep -q 'Total incidents:' triage-report.md && grep -q 'Open:' triage-report.md && grep -q 'Resolved/closed:' triage-report.md

results.criterion: `triage-report.md` contains a `## P1 / P2 Open Incidents (Escalated)` section
results.command: python triage.py && grep -q '## P1 / P2 Open Incidents (Escalated)' triage-report.md

results.criterion: Each P1 or P2 open incident in the report has its note updated via PATCH (verified by calling GET /incidents/{id} and confirming the notes array is non-empty)
results.command: python triage.py && curl -s -H 'Authorization: Bearer dev-secret-token-abc123' http://localhost:8000/incidents/INC-1004 | jq '.notes | length > 0' && curl -s -H 'Authorization: Bearer dev-secret-token-abc123' http://localhost:8000/incidents/INC-1007 | jq '.notes | length > 0' && curl -s -H 'Authorization: Bearer dev-secret-token-abc123' http://localhost:8000/incidents/INC-1009 | jq '.notes | length > 0' && curl -s -H 'Authorization: Bearer dev-secret-token-abc123' http://localhost:8000/incidents/INC-1010 | jq '.notes | length > 0' && curl -s -H 'Authorization: Bearer dev-secret-token-abc123' http://localhost:8000/incidents/INC-1014 | jq '.notes | length > 0'

results.criterion: `triage-report.md` contains an `## All Open Incidents` section
results.command: python triage.py && grep -q '## All Open Incidents' triage-report.md

results.criterion: `triage-report.md` contains a `## Resolved / Closed Incidents` section
results.command: python triage.py && grep -q '## Resolved / Closed Incidents' triage-report.md

results.criterion: The stdout summary line matches the format: `Triage complete. N open (N escalated), N resolved. Report: triage-report.md`
results.command: python triage.py 2>&1 | grep -q 'Triage complete. [0-9]* open ([0-9]*) escalated), [0-9]* resolved. Report: triage-report.md'
